manifest.name: Minimal Quiz

name: Minimal Quiz

releases.author: Lutu-gl
releases.description:
Minimal Quiz is a lightweight and intuitive quiz plugin for Obsidian. With this plugin, you can define questions directly in your Markdown files and instantly turn them into a quiz—no extra setup required!

## ✨ Features
- 📝 **Markdown-based quizzes** – Just write questions ending with `?` and answers below.
- ⚡ **Simple & minimalistic** – No complex UI, just a seamless integration into Obsidian.
- 🎯 **Keyboard shortcuts** – Use `Enter` or `Space` to reveal answers.
- 🎨 **Customizable modal** – Choose between centered or left-aligned text and enable background blur.

📖 **For the latest updates and usage instructions, check out the [README.md](https://github.com/Lutu-gl/Obsidian-Minimal-Quiz/blob/master/README.md).**
releases.name: v1.0.0 - Initial Release
